overview: Raje Di Hatti is a world-class, ultra-premium, mobile-first restaurant web app for a renowned Punjabi eatery in Sant Nagar Burari, Delhi. Built to rival top food brands in design, UX, and conversion with a deep matte black and gold design system, cinematic animations, and a full menu of authentic Punjabi dishes.
features: Full-screen cinematic hero with psychological triggers and trust badges
3D animated WOW food scene with floating kulhad lassi
App-like menu with 50+ items, search, and veg filter
Ordering via Zomato, Swiggy, and Porter
Live reviews with persistent backend storage
Loyalty badge system for repeat visitors
Animated background with floating particles and cursor parallax
Delivery zone breakdown with estimated times
Google Maps embed and contact section
Branded 404 page and SEO schema markup
